text:
I've optimized the on-chain scanning to be **much faster**:

## ⚡ Performance Improvements

**Before:**
- Sequential checks: 535 requests one-by-one
- ~100ms delay every 20 checks
- Total time: ~60+ seconds

**Now:**
- Parallel batch processing: 10 tokens at once
- All 5 spenders checked in parallel for each token
- 50 parallel requests at a time
- Total time: **~10-15 seconds**

**How it works:**
1. Processes 10 tokens at a time
2. For each token, checks all 5 spenders in parallel
3. Shows progress percentage in console
4. Much faster completion

This should now complete in 10-15 seconds instead of 60+ seconds. The approvals will show up much quicker, similar to Smol Frame's experience (though they use a pre-indexed API which is instant).

Try it now - it should be significantly faster!
